raw_consumer_statement:
I am a XXXX XXXX XXXX. A client was charged {$1100.00} on XX/XX/XXXX, for a XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX The service was completed in full on XX/XX/XXXX. On XX/XX/XXXX, the client filed a chargeback with Citibank claiming the service was not as described. 

I responded through my merchant provider ( XXXX ) within the XXXX deadline and submitted strong evidence : a signed service contract, before-and-after photos, video, security footage, and texts from the client expressing satisfaction. 

However, XXXX never notified me of the dispute resolution, never shared documentation, and denied me access to the issuing bank. Only after repeated follow-ups in XXXX did XXXX finally XXXX the name of the issuing bankCitibank. But by then, the case had been closed and I had no opportunity to appeal or submit additional evidence directly. 

The client has retained the hair extensions and also posted false reviews online after receiving the full service. I believe this chargeback was filed under false pretenses, and I was denied a fair process by both Citibank and XXXX. I mailed a formal appeal with supporting evidence directly to Citibank, but I have not received any response or acknowledgment.
